description: Auto-format files after editing based on file extension

hooks.command: jq -r '.tool_input.file_path' | { read file_path; case "$file_path" in *.ts|*.tsx|*.js|*.jsx) npx prettier --write "$file_path" 2>/dev/null || true ;; *.py) black "$file_path" 2>/dev/null || true ;; *.go) gofmt -w "$file_path" 2>/dev/null || true ;; *.rs) rustfmt "$file_path" 2>/dev/null || true ;; esac; }
